reviews.review_msg: Suzanna is very unorganized with lectures with little to no, engagement, basically just rambles (for 3 hours, no slides). Readings are heavy and assigned Monday, yet due Tuesday, which feels unfair. Course lacks clear structure, and expectations (especially for group work) are unclear. I would avoid her if you can

her lectures can be boring and sometimes she  will NOT make sense. HOWEVER she posts easily accessible guides on her canvas page which are pretty much cheat sheets for the assignments. The content may be very confusing which I will not deny, but if you can; try to take notes because they will help. shes a chill person tho. not that bad
The class is harder than you would expect! The TA is helpful but it doesn't really matter when there 100 new things every week that you have to learn.

This professor assumes you already know statistics and only need a review which makes understanding difficult. Her teaching style is unclear, and the TA isn't helpful either. unfortunately, no one else teach this damn course, leaving students struggling through complex, unfamiliar material. She is nice but the worst teacher ever. TA is a nightmare.

Most of the bad reviews are from first years who received bad marks because they didn't follow the rubrics, so don't trust those. Crage was a good prof and the assignments were all straight forward. Marking depends on the TA but we had open book exams that were super easy as long as you have good notes.

I have had three courses with Suzanna and I wish I had more! She's a great prof who is very passionate. If you don't understand statistics I'm very confident that Suzanna would be able to guide you through this course. Sometimes the lectures can be a bit boring and redundant to the asynchronous things she posts though.

The best Q prof in the SA department causes you don't really have a choice. She is really nice and also makes sure you understand the assignment. MAKE SURE YOU GO TO HER OFFICE HOURS IF YOU ARE CONFUSED ABOUT THE ASSIGNMENT, She can teach you how to do your assignment during office hours so really recommend going to the office hours.

Holy God this is a hard course. SO HARD. If you are not mathematically or statistically or technically literate, this will be SO HARD FOR YOU. So many things are explained through writing rather than visuals. I have had to research almost every single concept on Google and watch Youtube videos made for KIDS that explained it better than this class.

I took this class as a requirement for my program. Suzanna teaches lecture heavy, lectures were not mandatory but tutorials were. Overall Suzanna is good professor, she provides good feedback. Some concepts are very hard to understand but she is good at providing help. There will be a lot of assignments!

Suzanna is a great prof. I was a bit nervous for this class, statistics can seem very daunting. honestly though, it was way better than I expected it to be and on the modules Suzanna goes over everything very thoroughly and is super flexible on scheduling private office hours to ask questions and explain the material or assignments.
